channel.title: Forward Motion — The Derek Edition
channel.itunes:author: Samwise
channel.description: A private, personalized podcast for Derek: practical moves and fresh news across revenue management, building your own thing, AI leverage, health, money, and family. Produce more than you put in.
channel.itunes:summary: A private, personalized podcast for Derek. Produce more than you put in.

item.title: Building the Revenue Management Platform
item.itunes:summary: A long-form working session on turning Derek's revenue-management dashboard into a real software platform: product workflow, GitHub, Claude Code and Claude Design, safe web-app design, tenant-scoped data, integrations, AI agents, and the first practical build sprint.
item.description: A long-form working session on turning Derek's revenue-management dashboard into a real software platform: product workflow, GitHub, Claude Code and Claude Design, safe web-app design, tenant-scoped data, integrations, AI agents, and the first practical build sprint.

item.title: Ep. 2 — The Derek Edition
item.itunes:summary: Six parts: revenue-management triage, building your own product, AI as leverage, the health protocol (with this month's retatrutide Phase 3 news), money and structure for the 1099 to W-2 shift, and the Texas why.
item.description: Six parts: revenue-management triage, building your own product, AI as leverage, the health protocol (with this month's retatrutide Phase 3 news), money and structure for the 1099 to W-2 shift, and the Texas why.
